nasb.text: then the priest shall order them to wash the thing in which the mark occurs and he shall quarantine it for seven more days.

esv.text: then the priest shall command that they wash the thing in which is the disease, and he shall shut it up for another seven days.

cnv.text: 祭司就要吩咐人把它洗淨，然後再隔離七天。

ccb.text: 就要吩咐人洗净衣物，再隔离七天。
